name: Patchbay 501 — NaNoGEon
description: AI-powered serialized fiction pipeline architecture; Trope-driven story bible and beat sheet generation; Prompt engineering for commercial prose output; Cover illustration generation and text compositing; EPUB, DOCX, and web reader export formats; Media literacy and content factory ethics

criteria.narrative: Attend the full 8-hour Patchbay 501 — NaNoGEon and complete the in-workshop exercises. Completion is verified via a workshop-session hash.

@note_cpd: Workshops may be eligible for Continuing Professional Development (CPD) hours under relevant professional society frameworks (e.g., AusIMM Category 1 — Formal Learning) subject to member self-assessment and society audit.
